qa_pairs.question: Why does the OpenStack documentation provide a list of command groups?
qa_pairs.answer: The documentation provides a list of command groups to help users easily identify which commands are available to the average user, as many commands are restricted to OpenStack administrators and will return an error if a non-administrator tries to use them.

qa_pairs.question: What are some of the actions that can be performed using the `server` command group in the OpenStack command-line interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Within the `server` command group, users can perform actions such as `add security group`, `migrate`, `resume`, `unlock`, `add volume`, `pause`, `set`, and `unpause`.
